verses.text: I, Paul, 'the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,' was given the mystery by revelation. A prisoner for them. He suffers gladly for the Gentile gospel.
I, Paul, 'the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,' was given the mystery by revelation. A prisoner for them. He suffers gladly for the Gentile gospel.
I, Paul, 'the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,' was given the mystery by revelation. A prisoner for them. He suffers gladly for the Gentile gospel.
The Gentiles are 'fellowheirs, and of the same body,' partakers of the promise. One body. Jew and Gentile share the same inheritance.
The Gentiles are 'fellowheirs, and of the same body,' partakers of the promise. One body. Jew and Gentile share the same inheritance.
The Gentiles are 'fellowheirs, and of the same body,' partakers of the promise. One body. Jew and Gentile share the same inheritance.
Unto me is grace given to 'preach... the unsearchable riches of Christ.' Rich gospel. He proclaims a wealth beyond searching.
Unto me is grace given to 'preach... the unsearchable riches of Christ.' Rich gospel. He proclaims a wealth beyond searching.
Unto me is grace given to 'preach... the unsearchable riches of Christ.' Rich gospel. He proclaims a wealth beyond searching.
That 'the manifold wisdom of God' be known by the church; in Him we have boldness and access. God's wisdom. The church displays His wisdom to all.
That 'the manifold wisdom of God' be known by the church; in Him we have boldness and access. God's wisdom. The church displays His wisdom to all.
That 'the manifold wisdom of God' be known by the church; in Him we have boldness and access. God's wisdom. The church displays His wisdom to all.
Faint not at my tribulations; 'I bow my knees unto the Father.' Praying for them. He turns from his sufferings to intercession.
Faint not at my tribulations; 'I bow my knees unto the Father.' Praying for them. He turns from his sufferings to intercession.
Faint not at my tribulations; 'I bow my knees unto the Father.' Praying for them. He turns from his sufferings to intercession.
That ye be strengthened by His Spirit, and 'know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge.' Boundless love. Christ's love is greater than we can grasp.
That ye be strengthened by His Spirit, and 'know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge.' Boundless love. Christ's love is greater than we can grasp.
That ye be strengthened by His Spirit, and 'know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge.' Boundless love. Christ's love is greater than we can grasp.
That ye be strengthened by His Spirit, and 'know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge.' Boundless love. Christ's love is greater than we can grasp.
'Unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think... be glory.' Mighty God. He gives beyond all our asking.
